source_pr.title: planner: try fix flaky test TestTiFlashLateMaterialization
source_pr.body:

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

-->

Issue Number: close #61989

Problem Summary:

### What changed and how does it work?

### Check List

- [ ] No need to test

  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Side effects

Documentation

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: Casetest `TestTiFlashLateMaterialization` (plan_normalized_suite) had unstable EXPLAIN output for TiFlash late materialization around predicates like `a > 2`.
failure_signature: TestTiFlashLateMaterialization: golden EXPLAIN mismatch / unstable plan output (TiFlash late materialization).
root_cause_explanation: The casetest asserts an exact EXPLAIN output. With the original predicates (e.g. `a > 2`), the optimizer could choose a different TiFlash late materialization plan in some runs, causing golden output mismatches. The PR makes the cases less boundary-sensitive by changing those predicates to `a > 3`, stabilizing the chosen plan/output.
fix_pattern: Adjust casetest SQL predicates (e.g. `a > 2` → `a > 3`) in plan_normalized_suite to stabilize TiFlash late materialization EXPLAIN output.

evidence: evidence: planner: try fix flaky test TestTiFlashLateMaterialization
